framework.name: Auth0 FGA (Zanzibar) for Stateful Delegation
framework.description: Instead of encoding delegation state in tokens (which bloat/break at scale), store it in a Zanzibar-style relationship graph. Each hop validates and updates the graph. Attenuation without new token formats.
framework.raw_quote: This stateful context lives in FGA, not in the token, enabling capability-style attenuation without requiring new token formats.

source.title: Control the Chain, Secure the System: Fixing AI Agent Delegation
